headline: AI to Fuel Fashion, Footwear Spending
summary: UBS analyst Jay Sole says AI will "accelerate GDP growth" that will fuel increased fashion and footwear spending by U.S. consumers.

headline: Boot Barn Trades at Premium Valuation: Overvalued or Apt for Entry?

headline: 5 Revealing Analyst Questions From Deckers’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Deckers’ first quarter performance was driven by continued momentum across its leading brands, HOKA and UGG, as management pointed to strong consumer adoption of new product lines and full price sell-through, particularly in direct-to-consumer (DTC) channels. CEO Stefano Caroti cited innovative product pipelines and disciplined inventory management as key factors, emphasizing that “high levels of full price sell through underscored our continued focus on quality sales.” Management also highlight

headline: Has Nike Stock Lost Its Superpower?
summary: The stock’s bulls say margins will revert to normal once the sneaker maker regains its footing. But what if its superpower is gone for good?
